uplink.description: Full uplink: battery, temperature, humidity, CO2, pressure
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload; expected values produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js Decoder() (oracle) and applying the normalization mapping. battery 0x5A=90%; temp 0x00EB=235/10=23.5; humidity 0x6E=110/2=55; CO2 0x0320=800ppm; pressure 0x2794=10132/10=1013.2 hPa (atmospheric).

uplink.description: Negative temperature with low atmospheric pressure
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload; expected from reference/upstream-codec.js oracle. temp 0xFFC9=-55/10=-5.5 (two's complement); humidity 0x50=80/2=40; CO2 0x01F4=500ppm; pressure 0x2384=9092/10=909.2 hPa (atmospheric).
Synthetic: channel 0xFF/type 0xFF is not a known EM500-CO2 channel, so no channels are recognized.
